name: Tofu Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Tahini or peanut butter OR sunflower seed butter
1 pinch Sugar or a little Honey
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Blend until very smooth and creamy.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
4. Serve with fresh vegetables, crackers, or use as a sandwich filling.
5. Makes about 2 cups.
